subcodes.first_line: A noble Book sent down by God, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed, to guide mankind unto this momentous Announcement which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب کریم نزل من لدی الله العلیم الخبیر لیهدی الناس الی هذا النباء العظیم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @prayer for forgiveness, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
